user_query:
I exported my habit data to input/habits.json and input/logs.json. Please generate a 14-day progress analysis using only that data and write two files under output/:

1) output/stats.json — a machine-readable per-habit stats array sorted by habit name ascending. Include for each active habit exactly these fields:
- habitId (string)
- name (string)
- frequency ("daily"|"weekly"|"monthly")
- target (integer)
- windowStart ("2026-03-18")
- windowEnd ("2026-03-31")
- windowDays (14)
- totalCompletions (sum of counts within the window)
- activeDays (number of unique dates with logs within the window)
- completionRateStats (integer percent, see rules below)
- streakCurrentDays (current daily streak as of 2026-03-31, see rules below)
- streakLongestDays (longest daily streak over all available logs)
- progressBar (14-char string using "█" for any day with count>0 and "░" otherwise; left-to-right is newest-to-oldest with 2026-03-31 at the leftmost and 2026-03-18 at the rightmost)
- completionRateReport (integer percent, see rules below)
- onTrack (boolean; true if completionRateReport >= 80)

2) output/report.txt — a human-readable summary with this exact format:
- First line: "Habit Tracker Report (2026-03-18 to 2026-03-31)"
- Then, for each active habit in name-ascending order:
  - Line 1: the habit name
  - Line 2: the same 14-char progressBar as above
  - Line 3: "Completions: X | Streak: Y days | Rate: Z%" where X=totalCompletions, Y=streakCurrentDays, Z=completionRateReport
  - Then a blank line
- Final line: "Summary: A/B habits on track (≥80% completion)" where A is the count of habits with onTrack=true and B is the total number of active habits

Rules and assumptions:
- Consider only habits with active=true in input/habits.json.
- Compute over the inclusive window 2026-03-18..2026-03-31 (14 days). Treat 2026-03-31 as "today" for streaks and progress bars.
- completionRateStats expected completions by frequency: daily → days*target; weekly → ceil(days/7)*target; monthly → ceil(days/30)*target. Then completionRateStats = round(min(100, (total/expected)*100)).
- completionRateReport for the progress report uses days*target regardless of frequency: completionRateReport = round((total/(days*target))*100). This is intentionally different from completionRateStats.
- Current streak (streakCurrentDays): count consecutive calendar days with at least one log ending at today (2026-03-31). If there is no log on 2026-03-31 but there is a log on 2026-03-30, the streak can start from 2026-03-30; otherwise 0. Longest streak (streakLongestDays): the maximum number of consecutive calendar days with any logs across all available logs (not just the 14-day window).
- A day is considered "logged" if there is any log for that habit with that date and count>0.
- For progressBar, generate exactly 14 characters, one per day: leftmost is 2026-03-31, rightmost is 2026-03-18; use "█" where that day has any logs for the habit, otherwise "░".
- Sort habits by name ascending identically in both files.

Do not invent data or ask me questions — just read input/habits.json and input/logs.json and produce the outputs exactly as specified.
